subtasks.description: Query MongoDB for all active billing contracts with contract ID, vendor name, contracted annual value, and contract start/end dates. Filter for contracts that are currently active (status='active' OR end_date >= today).

Query SQL invoice warehouse for all invoices issued in 2024 (invoice_date between 2024-01-01 and 2024-12-31). Return invoice amount, contract_id, vendor, and invoice date. Aggregate total invoice value by contract_id.

Reconcile MongoDB active contracts with SQL 2024 invoice totals. For each contract, calculate variance as (actual_2024_invoices - contracted_annual_value) / contracted_annual_value. Flag contracts with absolute variance >10% or ≤-10%. Return flagged contracts with contract_id, vendor, contracted_value, actual_2024_value, variance_percent, and variance_flag.

plan.cost_rationale: Three subtasks required: (1) MongoDB query for active contracts is simple single-collection query (small tier). (2) SQL aggregation of 2024 invoices by contract is straightforward single-table aggregation (small tier). (3) Cross-reconciliation requires joining two sources, calculating variance metrics, and applying classification logic (flagging >10% variance), which is the core reconciliation responsibility (mid tier). Cost-effective decomposition: we do not split contract/invoice retrieval into separate queries per vendor since a single query can fetch all contracts and all invoices in parallel, and the variance calculation and flagging is inherently part of the reconciliation step, not a separate policy or downstream action.

output.sql: SELECT contract_id, vendor_name, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_invoice_amount_usd, COUNT(*) AS invoice_count, MIN(invoice_date) AS first_invoice_date, MAX(invoice_date) AS last_invoice_date FROM invoice_facts WHERE invoice_date >= '2024-01-01' AND invoice_date <= '2024-12-31' GROUP BY contract_id, vendor_name ORDER BY total_invoice_amount_usd DESC

reconciled.note: MongoDB is primary source (LEFT JOIN semantics). Contracts in MongoDB without matching 2024 invoices receive sql_value=null, variance_flag=true (complete underutilization). Contracts in SQL without MongoDB match are excluded per LEFT JOIN semantics.
